description: Nick from the Solana Foundation Devrel team explains how to create Solana Actions using the Solana Actions SDK. He covers the basics of setting up a Next JS app, configuring CORS, and building HTTP routes for GET and POST requests. The tutorial includes installing necessary SDKs, creating a project structure, and defining the action's metadata and transaction response.
topic_summary: Learn to build Solana Actions with the Solana Actions SDK, covering setup, HTTP routing, and response handling [t=0:24 - t=3:00].
